suggestedFixes: Fix "href=#" and empty links by pointing them to valid endpoints or removing placeholders.
Resolve 404 errors by checking if resources (scripts, styles, images) were moved or renamed.
Review browser console for JavaScript type errors or unhandled promise rejections.
Update <head> section with unique meta descriptions and OpenGraph tags for better SEO/Social sharing.
